glosses.ja: 片付ける; 取り除く

sentences.target: Je débarrasse la table après le dîner.
sentences.reading: /ʒə de.ba.ʁas la tabl a.pʁɛ lə di.ne/

translations.fr: Je débarrasse la table après le dîner.
translations.ipa: /ʒə de.ba.ʁas la tabl a.pʁɛ lə di.ne/
translations.en: I clear the table after dinner.
translations.es: Recojo la mesa después de la cena.
translations.de: Ich räume nach dem Abendessen den Tisch ab.
translations.ru: Я убираю со стола после ужина.
translations.pt: Eu limpo a mesa depois do jantar.
translations.he: אני מפנה את השולחן אחרי ארוחת הערב.
translations.vi: Tôi dọn bàn sau bữa tối.
translations.nl: Ik ruim de tafel af na het avondeten.
translations.uk: Я прибираю зі столу після вечері.
translations.hi: मैं रात के खाने के बाद मेज़ साफ करता हूँ.
translations.el: Μαζεύω το τραπέζι μετά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Jeg rydder av bordet etter middag.
translations.id: Saya membereskan meja setelah makan malam.
translations.sv: Jag dukar av bordet efter middagen.
translations.da: Jeg rydder af bordet efter aftensmaden.
translations.ja: 夕食のあとにテーブルを片付けます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular (agrees with ‘Je’); transitive, takes a direct object.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun ‘table’ as a specific referent.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘débarrasse’.
Preposition introducing a temporal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘dîner’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘après’.

sentences.target: Tu dois débarrasser les assiettes et les verres.
sentences.reading: /ty dwa de.ba.ʁa.se le za.sjɛt e le vɛʁ/

translations.fr: Tu dois débarrasser les assiettes et les verres.
translations.ipa: /ty dwa de.ba.ʁa.se le za.sjɛt e le vɛʁ/
translations.en: You have to clear the plates and glasses.
translations.es: Tienes que recoger los platos y los vasos.
translations.de: Du musst die Teller und die Gläser abräumen.
translations.it: Devi sparecchiare i piatti e i bicchieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 你得把盘子和杯子收走。
translations.ru: Тебе нужно убрать тарелки и стаканы.
translations.pt: Você tem que tirar os pratos e os copos.
translations.he: אתה צריך לפנות את הצלחות והכוסות.
translations.vi: Bạn phải dọn đĩa và ly.
translations.nl: Je moet de borden en de glazen afruimen.
translations.uk: Ти маєш прибрати тарілки і склянки.
translations.hu: Le kell szedned a tányérokat és a poharakat.
translations.hi: तुम्हें प्लेटें और गिलास हटाने हैं.
translations.el: Πρέπει να μαζέψεις τα πιάτα και τα ποτήρια.
translations.nb: Du må rydde bort tallerkener og glass.
translations.id: Kamu harus membereskan piring dan gelas.
translations.sv: Du måste plocka bort tallrikarna och glasen.
translations.ro: Trebuie să strângi farfuriile și paharele.
translations.da: Du skal tage tallerkener og glas af bordet.
translations.fi: Sinun pitää kerätä lautaset ja lasit.
translations.ja: 皿とグラスを片付けなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; expresses obligation; takes an infinitival complement.
Infinitive verb; complement of ‘dois’; transitive, will take direct objects.
Definite article, plural; introduces ‘assiettes’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘débarrasser’.
Coordinating conjunction linking two coordinated noun phrases.
Definite article, plural; introduces ‘verres’.
Common noun, masculine plural; second coordinated direct object of ‘débarrasser’.

sentences.target: On débarrasse le plan de travail.

translations.fr: On débarrasse le plan de travail.
translations.it: Stiamo sgombrando il piano di lavoro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang dọn mặt bàn bếp.
translations.hi: हम रसोई का काउंटर साफ कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: キッチンの作業台を片付けています。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun used for generic or colloquial ‘we’; grammatically 3rd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular (agrees with ‘On’); transitive; takes a direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘plan’.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the compound noun phrase ‘plan de travail’; direct object of ‘débarrasse’.
Preposition linking ‘plan’ to its complement ‘travail’ to form the compound ‘plan de travail’.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition ‘de’ within the compound ‘plan de travail’.

sentences.target: Nous allons débarrasser le salon de ces cartons.
sentences.reading: /nu za.lɔ̃ de.ba.ʁa.se lə sa.lɔ̃ də se kaʁ.tɔ̃/

translations.fr: Nous allons débarrasser le salon de ces cartons.
translations.ipa: /nu za.lɔ̃ de.ba.ʁa.se lə sa.lɔ̃ də se kaʁ.tɔ̃/
translations.en: We’re going to clear the living room of these boxes.
translations.es: Vamos a sacar estas cajas del salón.
translations.de: Wir räumen diese Kisten aus dem Wohnzimmer.
translations.it: Stiamo per sgomberare il salotto da queste scatole.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们要把客厅里的这些箱子清走。
translations.yue: 我哋會清走客廳嘅呢啲箱。
translations.ru: Мы собираемся убрать из гостиной эти коробки.
translations.pt: Vamos tirar essas caixas da sala.
translations.he: אנחנו עומדים לפנות את הסלון מהקופסאות האלה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ dọn những thùng này ra khỏi phòng khách.
translations.ar: سنزيل هذه الصناديق من غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: We gaan deze dozen uit de woonkamer halen.
translations.uk: Ми збираємося прибрати ці коробки з вітальні.
translations.hu: Ki fogjuk vinni ezeket a dobozokat a nappaliból.
translations.hi: हम इन डिब्बों को बैठक से हटाने वाले हैं.
translations.pl: Zamierzamy wynieść te pudła z salonu.
translations.el: Θα βγάλουμε αυτά τα κουτιά από το σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Vi skal få bort disse eskene fra stua.
translations.id: Kami akan menyingkirkan kotak-kotak ini dari ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Vi ska få bort de här lådorna från vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Vom scoate aceste cutii din sufragerie.
translations.cs: Chystáme se odnést tyto krabice z obývacího pokoje.
translations.da: Vi skal fjerne disse kasser fra stuen.
translations.fi: Aiomme viedä nämä laatikot pois olohuoneesta.
translations.ja: この箱を居間から運び出します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; used to form the near future (futur proche) with an infinitive.
Infinitive main verb; complement of the auxiliary ‘allons’; transitive.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces ‘salon’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘débarrasser’.
Preposition introducing the complement indicating what is being removed; part of the construction ‘débarrasser X de Y’.
Demonstrative determiner, plural; modifies ‘cartons’.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition ‘de’, denoting the items to be removed.
